{{CargoRelic
|name=Xiahou Yuan's Helm
|class_id=20766
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=Passed down after Xiahou D ascended to the Domain. Now worn by his little brother guarding the Cyclops Domain. Family tradition: getting stuck with big bro's old gear.
|fame=13
|art=16
|fth=31
|civ=17
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +1<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +2<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail DEF +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
